critic_findings.message: get_core_api_user is 52 lines (lines 31-82), exceeding the 50-line max by 2. Trim the docstring (16 lines) or extract the try/except error-handling into a _validate_token() helper.

API contract change: error details collapsed from two distinct messages ('Missing Authorization header' / 'Invalid Authorization header format') into one generic 'Missing or invalid Authorization header'. Core-api callers parsing error details will lose the ability to distinguish missing vs. malformed headers. Confirm this is acceptable with the core-api team, or restore distinct messages by checking whether _extract_bearer_token returned None due to missing input vs. bad format.
